rows.label: tev014501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Keith about the status of NLA's infrastructure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014501_MSG0001
rows.name:
We've finished building the Biahno
water-purification plant, but as far as this
area itself goes, it's still as dangerous as ever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014501_MSG0002
rows.name:
A BLADE that was patrolling around
here was attacked and wounded by a
weird indigen known as a cantor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014501_MSG0003
rows.name:
We're actually thinking of posting another
bounty mission. So if you're willing to take
it on, I hope you wipe those things out for us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014501_MSG0008
rows.name:
Do you remember what I said
before? About how we could make
great booze with this water?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014501_MSG0009
rows.name:
I mentioned that to Ajoa, and she told
me to stop talking and make it happen![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014501_MSG0010
rows.name:
I guess we've got the water
handled. Now we just need to
start planting some grain fields.[ST:wait ]
